title: Implement raw HTTP Vault KV v2 GET without vaultrs
description: Replace vaultrs::kv2::read with a raw reqwest call to GET /v1/<mount>/data/<path> with X-Vault-Token header. Use the nested extractor from the secretx-core task to navigate the response. Map HTTP 404 to SecretError::NotFound. Map other non-2xx to SecretError::Backend. Remove vaultrs dependency from secretx-hashicorp-vault/Cargo.toml once GET is covered.
